description: You are a postsecondary education administrator who needs to update the school's contact information in OpenSIS after a campus relocation. Log into OpenSIS (URL: http://localhost/opensis, Username: admin, Password: Admin@123) and update the 'Demo School' record with the following details: Address: 456 Oak Avenue, City: Springfield, State: IL, Zip Code: 62704, and Phone: 217-555-9876.
